title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.267 - Experimental use, adoption of or abandonment of electronic voting equipment authorized
text:
115.267.  Experimental use, adoption of or abandonment of electronic voting equipment authorized. — Any election authority may adopt, experiment with or abandon any electronic voting system approved for use in the state, or may lease one or more electronic voting machines or other equipment, either with or without option to purchase, and may use any authorized electronic voting equipment at any polling place in its jurisdiction.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 8.345, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1136)
